title: Free-floating fungal fondu
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Free-floating fungal fondu''' was a food delicacy enjoyed by [[Ugor/Legends|Ugors]]. The chef droid [[L9-G8]] instructed the rebel crew of the ''[[Bonderium]]'' to cook this dish for an Ugorian feast, in order to bribe [[ArrGack]] and [[GrrKack]] for admission to the [[Paradise system/Legends|Paradise system]].

{{Food-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"Fondu" may be similar to [[Wikipedia:Fondue|fondue]], a traditional treat involving melted cheese.

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
